evidence: SPSS GLM PercentRember PercentCorrectMC PercentCorrectOE BY Condition /WSFACTOR=factor1 3 Polynomial /WSDESIGN=factor1 /DESIGN=Condition
between-subjects main effect of testing condition on average predicted future performance

Recomputed from the author's SPSS mixed GLM using listwise-complete cases on Condition, PercentRember, PercentCorrectMC, PercentCorrectOE. Within-subject levels are ordered as in the SPSS syntax: PercentRember, PercentCorrectMC, PercentCorrectOE. n_total = 121; Condition levels = 1; 2; group counts = 1:63; 2:58. Row 35 extracts the between-subjects Condition effect from Tests of Between-Subjects Effects.
